Push to main or run ecr-push.yml via workflow_dispatch. It will use OIDC with no static credentials.

Troubleshooting “Invalid character in header content [authorization]”: This means the role ARN contains an unexpected character or whitespace. Verify that vars.AWS_ROLE_TO_ASSUME contains only the raw ARN (no quotes, no trailing spaces) and that the OIDC provider trust policy sub condition exactly matches repo:swa417-afk/tradingqquant-sim:*.
